description: After Rigby's audit returned, Jarvis took over presenting results and proposing bulk deletions instead of routing the corrected criteria back through Rigby for proper execution.
correction: Rigby owns stale file audits end-to-end — discovery, analysis, proposal, and execution. Jarvis relays, not re-interprets or extends.
systemic_fix: When Rigby's audit returns with errors, send corrections back to Rigby and let her re-run. Don't take over the audit.
